no: Quest triggered via Limited Wish spell. A djinn delivers a bard's note leading to encounters in Trademeet (AR2000) and the Graveyard (AR4000). Involves an orc, a princess, a kobold, paladins, and multiple outcomes. Originally Polish, translated to French and English.
sum: Quest triggered via the Limited Wish spell. A djinn delivers a note from a bard, leading to encounters with an orc, a princess, a kobold, and paladins across Trademeet and the Graveyard.

co.no: Adds Limited Wish scroll to Trademeet shop (shop08.sto). Spawns quest NPCs in Trademeet and Graveyard areas. Has BG2EE/EET journal entries.
